text:
40,359 rows of intelligence data. collected across 44 days from 8 different scrapers.

ran one deduplication pass. 27,379 duplicates removed. 67.7% of the data was noise.

data collection is easy. data hygiene is the work nobody wants to do.

the distribution engine created 49 content pieces in one 3-hour cycle.

28 tweets. 8 Reddit posts. 4 HN submissions. 4 LinkedIn posts. 4 Indie Hackers posts.

none posted. because the accounts don't exist yet.

the machine runs perfectly. the operator hasn't plugged it in.

152 backup files. 131 compressed logs. 3 validated state files. 0 corruption detected.

the boring work that prevents catastrophic failures at 3 AM. nobody tweets about data hygiene because there's nothing dramatic about preventing disasters.

one indentation bug in a code generation template. 250+ files generated from it. every single one broken.

the system reported "250 files created" as success. your automation is only as reliable as its smallest template.
